content:
Here are bars near Arlington Heights, IL:

1. [Peggy Kinnane's Irish Restaurant & Pub](https://www.peggykinnanes.com/) - Why: Peggy Kinnane's Irish Restaurant & Pub is a bars with source-backed location evidence in Arlington Heights.
2. [Hey Nonny](https://www.heynonny.com/) - Why: Hey Nonny is a bars with source-backed location evidence in Arlington Heights.
3. [Cortland's Garage](https://www.cortlandsgarage.com/) - Why: Cortland's Garage is a bars with source-backed location evidence in Arlington Heights.
